purpose: Active file lock registry for preventing AI worker collisions before APPLY work begins.
registry_notes: Initial clean state created by Phase 0 infrastructure repair.
DRY_RUN scripts may read this file and simulate outcomes.
No script in this folder claims, releases, or mutates real locks without approval.

collision_policy.default_safe_action: Stop and ask the operator before APPLY.

next_safe_action: Run Get-AiOsWorkerLockStatus.DRY_RUN.ps1 to inspect the lock state.
